critical.mandate: New stories MUST follow the exact format used in existing epics-and-stories.md
Story IDs must not collide with existing story IDs
Append to existing content — never overwrite existing stories

step.title: Load Existing Epics and Stories
step.action: Read {planning_artifacts}/epics-and-stories.md
Parse all existing epic names and story IDs to avoid collisions
Identify the highest story ID per epic for numbering continuation

step.title: Identify New Requirements
step.ask: What new stories need to be added? Describe the requirements.
Do these belong to an existing epic, or is a new epic needed?
Is this linked to a change request? If so, provide the CR ID.
step.action: Read relevant sections of {planning_artifacts}/prd.md for context
Read relevant sections of {planning_artifacts}/architecture.md for technical context

step.title: Define New Stories
step.action: For each new story: title, description, acceptance criteria, size (S/M/L/XL)
Use format: "As a [user], I want to [action] so that [benefit]"
Assign story IDs continuing from highest existing ID in the target epic
If new epic needed: create epic header with name, description, goal, success criteria

step.title: Apply Risk Levels and Dependencies
step.action: If {test_artifacts}/test-plan.md exists: apply risk levels to new stories
Declare depends_on and blocks — check against ALL existing stories
Assign priority: P0/P1/P2
Verify no circular dependencies introduced

step.title: Append to Epics and Stories
step.action: If adding to existing epic: append after the last story in that epic
If new epic: append entire epic section at end of document
Add a change log entry at top: "## Change Log" with date, CR ID, stories added

step.title: Next Steps
step.action: Report stories added: list new story IDs and their epics
If stories should enter current sprint: "Run /kratos-correct-course to inject into sprint"
If stories should wait: "Stories are in backlog. Run /kratos-sprint-plan for next sprint."
For each new story: "Run /kratos-create-story {story_key} to elaborate before development"
